note: Session 45 AI-assisted fill. David authorized name picks from the MMX1 standard enemy roster based on (stage, bbox, hp, orient, spawn count). All entries carry a `confidence` marker in notes — low-confidence picks should be confirmed by looking at the matching red bbox on the annotated sheet before relying on the rename.

enemies_31592.png.name: hoganmer
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: medium. Spark Mandrill stage, 14x15, HP 64 — Hoganmer is the shielded mace-swinging enemy common to Spark Mandrill. Size fits the flail-body segment. 3 spawns.

enemies_31592.png.name: ball_de_voux
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: medium. Boomer Kuwanger stage (stg 6), wide shallow 33x22 HP 48, 1 spawn. Ball de Voux is the wall-rolling orb robot — size + stage fits. Could also be a Death Rogumer drop fragment.

enemies_31592.png.name: armor_soldier
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: medium. Sting Chameleon stage (stg 10), tall 20x52, HP 128 (big). Armor Soldier is the jungle-stage armored knight. flip_h = left-facing variant.

enemies_31592.png.name: amenhopper
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: medium. Sting Chameleon stage (stg 10), small 15x13 — Amenhopper is the jumping grasshopper-like enemy. Two OIDs (HP 2 and 10) likely represent adult + nymph or different elevations; aliased to one sprite.

enemies_31592.png.name: sea_mine
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: low-medium. Launch Octopus stage (stg 5), very wide-shallow 28x10. Could be a floating mine, Utuboros segment, or seafloor spike. KB-077 X-collapse cluster — 3 OIDs share one visible CC; Y-aware matcher needed to disambiguate per-OID.

enemies_31592.png.name: ray_bit
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: low. Storm Eagle stage (stg 8), 21x19 HP 1, 1 spawn. Ray Bit is a small fragile flying unit historically associated with Highway but reused. Could also be a Storm Eagle carrier micro-drone.

enemies_31592.png.name: turn_cannon
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: medium. Cross-stage reuse (Boomer Kuwanger, Storm Eagle, Flame Mammoth), tall narrow 14x52. Turn Cannon is the wall-mounted rotating gun that appears in multiple stages — size + multi-stage reuse fits. 3 OIDs aliased.

enemies_31592.png.name: crusher
enemies_31592.png.notes: confidence: medium. Central Highway intro (stg 0), 24x50 HP 4, 13 spawns (very common). Crusher is the walking mech/hover-ball enemy that populates the intro stage. High spawn count matches.

enemies_31593.png.name: rush_roader
enemies_31593.png.notes: confidence: medium-high. Armored Armadillo stage (stg 4), large 35x45, HP 8, 9 spawns. Rush Roader is the iconic mine-cart enemy — size + spawn density fits the stage.

enemies_31593.png.name: bit
enemies_31593.png.notes: confidence: low. Sigma 1 fortress (stg 11), 17x32, no HP observed (fragile / projectile). Bit is the fortress mini-enemy. Could also be a ceiling turret.

enemies_31593.png.name: jamminger
enemies_31593.png.notes: confidence: medium. Armored Armadillo stage (stg 4), 28x24 HP 1. Jamminger is the small flying mine common in the mine stage. 2 OIDs aliased = different spawn positions of the same species.

enemies_31593.png.name: notor_banger
enemies_31593.png.notes: confidence: low. Central Highway (stg 0), very tall narrow 11x56 HP 32, 2 spawns. Could be Notor Banger pillar or a highway column — tall narrow silhouette favors a static pillar/sentry.

enemies_31593.png.name: thunder_slimer_projectile
enemies_31593.png.notes: confidence: low. Spark Mandrill stage (stg 3), tiny 10x11, HP observed only 128 (slot-recycle artifact — no real HP). Likely a projectile or drop from Thunder Slimer rather than an autonomous enemy. 3 spawns.

enemies_31593.png.name: mad_pecker
enemies_31593.png.notes: confidence: medium. Storm Eagle stage (stg 8), 21x43 HP 8, 5 spawns. Mad Pecker is the Storm Eagle carrier's bird-drone. Size fits.

enemies_31594.png.name: spikey
enemies_31594.png.notes: confidence: medium. Chill Penguin stage (stg 2), 20x13 HP 2, 4 spawns. Spikey is the rolling snowball/spike enemy common in Chill Penguin. Size + spawn density fits.

enemies_31594.png.name: thunder_slimer
enemies_31594.png.notes: confidence: low. Spark Mandrill stage (stg 3), very wide shallow 30x10, HP 2, 1 spawn. Could be the Thunder Slimer's split-puddle form, or a horizontal lightning bolt.

enemies_31594.png.name: axe_max
enemies_31594.png.notes: confidence: medium. Chill Penguin stage (stg 2), 23x33 HP 6, 3 spawns. Axe Max is the penguin lumberjack enemy — size + HP fits. Could also be Flammingle.

enemies_31594.png.name: snow_shooter
enemies_31594.png.notes: confidence: medium-high. Chill Penguin stage (stg 2), 24x17, HP 127 (likely boss-slot recycle; Snow Shooter's true HP is 1). Snow Shooter is already catalogued in the KB (see knowledge_base/mmx1/enemies/snow_shooter/). flip_h = mirrored.

enemies_31594.png.name: bit
enemies_31594.png.notes: confidence: low. Sigma stage 2 (stg 12), tiny 12x12, HP 1/2. KB-078 OID-alias pair — same logical enemy under two slot IDs. Bit is the recurrent Sigma-fortress micro-drone.

enemies_31595.png.name: bomb_been
enemies_31595.png.notes: confidence: medium. Flame Mammoth stage (stg 9), 23x24 HP 1, 6 spawns. Bomb Been is the bomb-dropping bee common in the foundry stage.

enemies_31595.png.name: batton_bone
enemies_31595.png.notes: confidence: medium. Chill Penguin stage (stg 2), tiny 13x13 HP 1, 2 spawns. Batton Bone is the sleeping-bat enemy that wakes on approach. flip_h.

enemies_31595.png.name: crusher_mini
enemies_31595.png.notes: confidence: low. Storm Eagle stage (stg 8), tiny 13x13 HP 16, 3 spawns. Uncertain between a Crusher variant, a Sky Claw micro-drone, or a fragment. Low confidence — visual inspection recommended.

enemies_31595.png.name: tombot
enemies_31595.png.notes: confidence: low-medium. Sigma 1 fortress (stg 11), 19x32 HP 32, 1 spawn. Tombot is the fortress sentry / stationary turret. Could also be a reused Ball de Voux.
